title: Network Policy Restriction Lab
problemStatement: Internal payment and reporting services cannot communicate after a network policy hardening attempt. Determine what is blocked and implement a safe fix.
objective: Update policies to restore approved traffic and retrieve the flag from reporting service.
hints: List all NetworkPolicy objects and compare allowed selectors.
Validate DNS and namespace labels used by policies.
Use a temporary debug pod to test connectivity before/after changes.
guide: Step 2: Identify traffic flows required by payment -> reporting.
Step 3: Patch/create least-privilege network policy rules.
Step 4: Confirm connectivity and recover completion flag.
